notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Harper singles on a ground ball to pitcher Michael Wacha. Kyle Schwarber to 3rd. Bryce Harper to 2nd. Kyle Schwarber advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher Michael Wacha.

notableEvents.label: Starling Marte plunked
notableEvents.detail: Royals challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Starling Marte hit by pitch. Nick Loftin to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Lucas Erceg. Trea Turner scores. Bryce Harper to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
